Accreditations & Recognition

Our Certifications & Awards

Recognized for excellence, quality, and innovation

Quality Management

2020

ISO 9001:2015

International quality management system certification ensuring consistent service delivery

Issued by: International Organization for Standardization

Education

2021

NAAC Accreditation

National Assessment and Accreditation Council recognition for educational excellence

Issued by: Ministry of Education, India

Global Standards

2022

International Recognition

Recognized as a leading aerospace institution by international bodies

Issued by: International Aerospace Associations

Regulatory

Ongoing

Safety & Compliance

Full compliance with all regulatory requirements and safety standards

Issued by: Ministry of Civil Aviation

Research

2023

Innovation Excellence

Recognition for cutting-edge research and innovation in aerospace technology

Issued by: National Innovation Council

Overall

2023

Institutional Excellence

Award for outstanding contribution to aerospace education and research

Issued by: Government of India

Official Recognitions

Approved and recognized by leading government and international bodies

Recognized by Ministry of Education, Government of India
Member of International Aerospace Associations
Approved Training Provider for DGCA
Partner with National Institutions and International Universities
Certified Research Organization
Industry-Endorsed Training Programs

Our Commitment to Excellence

We maintain the highest standards in aerospace education, research, and training. Our accreditations reflect our dedication to quality, innovation, and compliance with international best practices.

100%

Standards Compliance

6+

Global

Recognition Level

IAAAAerospace Institute

Empowering India's Aerospace Community — From School to Sky. India's premier institute for aerospace education, training, and research.
